Hotel Manager Job at Fusion Group Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Fusion Group is a facility management company known for its professionalism.

Job Position: Hotel Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requiements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree at least five years in a managerial role to manager the activities of the whole hotel


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitmentfusiongroup.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

title: Warehouse & Logistics Manager Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency is a licensed full-fledged Human Resource firm with extensive expertise and experience in human Capital development and staffing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse & Logistics Manager

Job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Work mide: Hybrid (3 days on-site)

Job Detail


	We are looking for a smart and organized individual to manage warehouse operations, inventory, and product distribution.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage stock and inventory records
	Coordinate deliveries and logistics
	Ensure accurate and timely order fulfillment
	Support supervision of warehouse activities
	Track stock movement and resolve discrepancies


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND qualification with 0–1 year of experience in warehouse/logistics (Entry-level)
	Basic knowledge of inventory systems & Excel
	Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn
	Good organizational and communication.


Salary
N80,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Brand and Marketing",
  "description": "Kemslis Pragmatic Limited - Our client is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Brand and Marketing

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Strategic Thinking &amp; Planning:


	Ability to develop long-term brand and marketing strategies aligned with business goals
	Market positioning and competitive analysis
	Strong understanding of customer segmentation and targeting


Brand Management:


	Building and maintaining a strong, consistent brand identity
	Managing brand equity and reputation
	Ensuring consistency across all communication channels.


Leadership &amp; Team Management:


	Leading cross-functional marketing teams
	Coaching and developing team members
	Strong decision-making and conflict resolution skills.


Digital Marketing Expertise:


	Proficiency in digital channels (SEO, social media, email marketing, PPC)
	Understanding of content marketing and online customer journeys
	Data-driven campaign management.


Creativity &amp; Innovation:


	Ability to develop compelling campaigns and brand stories
	Innovative thinking to differentiate the brand in competitive markets
	Strong sense of design, messaging, and customer appeal.


Data Analysis &amp; Performance Measurement:


	Ability to interpret marketing analytics and KPIs
	Measuring ROI on campaigns
	Using data to optimize strategies and improve performance.


Communication &amp; Presentation Skills:


	Excellent verbal and written communication
	Stakeholder management (internal teams, clients, partners)
	Ability to present ideas and strategies clearly to executives.


Customer-Centric Mindset:


	Deep understanding of customer behavior and needs
	Building customer loyalty and engagement strategies
	Enhancing customer experience across touchpoints.


Budgeting &amp; Financial Acumen:


	Managing marketing budgets effectively
	Allocating resources for maximum ROI
	Understanding revenue impact of marketing initiatives.


Market Research &amp; Insights:


	Conducting and interpreting market research
	Keeping up with industry trends and competitor activities
	Translating insights into actionable strategies.


Project &amp; Campaign Management:


	Planning and executing large-scale campaigns
	Time management and multitasking across multiple projects
	Coordinating with agencies and vendors.


Adaptability &amp; Change Management:


	Responding quickly to market changes
	Leading brand transformation initiatives
	Staying updated with evolving marketing technologies.


Requirements


	Qualification: Tertiary Degree of minimum BSc. An MBA will be an added Advantage
	Length of Experience: 10 Years and Above
	Type of Experience:&nbsp;Expert in Integrated marketing communication and branding in the Automobile, FMCG, Advertising Agency, or Multinational Enterprise.





Benefits Attached
Official Car, HMO, Leave Allowance, 13th Month

Mode of Application
Interested and qualified candidates can send their CV as an attachment in either Word of PDF format to:&nbsp;kemslisrecruit@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Head of Brand and Marketing&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-07",

Head of Brand and Marketing Job at Kemslis Pragmatic Limited




        
    

        
        Kemslis Pragmatic Limited - Our client is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Brand and Marketing

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Strategic Thinking & Planning:


	Ability to develop long-term brand and marketing strategies aligned with business goals
	Market positioning and competitive analysis
	Strong understanding of customer segmentation and targeting


Brand Management:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Building and maintaining a strong, consistent brand identity
	Managing brand equity and reputation
	Ensuring consistency across all communication channels.


Leadership & Team Management:


	Leading cross-functional marketing teams
	Coaching and developing team members
	Strong decision-making and conflict resolution skills.


Digital Marketing Expertise:


	Proficiency in digital channels (SEO, social media, email marketing, PPC)
	Understanding of content marketing and online customer journeys
	Data-driven campaign management.


Creativity & Innovation:


	Ability to develop compelling campaigns and brand stories
	Innovative thinking to differentiate the brand in competitive markets
	Strong sense of design, messaging, and customer appeal.


Data Analysis & Performance Measurement:


	Ability to interpret marketing analytics and KPIs
	Measuring ROI on campaigns
	Using data to optimize strategies and improve performance.


Communication & Presentation Skills:


	Excellent verbal and written communication
	Stakeholder management (internal teams, clients, partners)
	Ability to present ideas and strategies clearly to executives.


Customer-Centric Mindset:


	Deep understanding of customer behavior and needs
	Building customer loyalty and engagement strategies
	Enhancing customer experience across touchpoints.


Budgeting & Financial Acumen:


	Managing marketing budgets effectively
	Allocating resources for maximum ROI
	Understanding revenue impact of marketing initiatives.


Market Research & Insights:


	Conducting and interpreting market research
	Keeping up with industry trends and competitor activities
	Translating insights into actionable strategies.


Project & Campaign Management:


	Planning and executing large-scale campaigns
	Time management and multitasking across multiple projects
	Coordinating with agencies and vendors.


Adaptability & Change Management:


	Responding quickly to market changes
	Leading brand transformation initiatives
	Staying updated with evolving marketing technologies.


Requirements


	Qualification: Tertiary Degree of minimum BSc. An MBA will be an added Advantage
	Length of Experience: 10 Years and Above
	Type of Experience: Expert in Integrated marketing communication and branding in the Automobile, FMCG, Advertising Agency, or Multinational Enterprise.





Benefits Attached
Official Car, HMO, Leave Allowance, 13th Month

Mode of Application
Interested and qualified candidates can send their CV as an attachment in either Word of PDF format to: [email protected] using "Head of Brand and Marketing" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Marketing Executive Job at Lance Trend Limited




        
    

        
        Lance Trend is a major distributor of technology products and Services for businesses in Nigeria, as well as partners with various ICT, manufacturers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive

Job Locations: Abuja & Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive product sales to meet company targets.
	Manage client relationships, generate leads, and close deals.
	Accurately document sales transactions and submit daily/weekly reports.
	Work closely with Accountant to ensure timely revenue reconciliation.
	Liaise with Store Officer for product availability and delivery updates.
	Provide market feedback to Head of Marketing and further loop in the Director.
	Plan and execute marketing campaigns (digital, print, and events).
	Manage social media platforms and online presence.
	Conduct market research to understand customer needs and preferences.

	Track and analyze campaign performance to optimize results.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Control / Compliance Officer",
  "description": "Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited -&nbsp;Our Client a Micro Finance Banking Company is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Control / Compliance Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
Purpose of Position:


	This position plays a key role in the review of policies, implementation of internal controls in the Bank.


Key Functions of the Position:


	Daily call over of the bank transactions with system balance
	Carryout Investigation as the Audit checklist and supervisor&rsquo;s recommendation to achieve optimal result for the bank.
	To plan, organize and carry out the internal controls function including the preparation of an audit manual, audit plan, scheduling and assigning work and estimating resource needs.
	Conduct risk assessment of departments/functional areas in accordance with timelines.
	Conduct audit testing of potential risk areas and identify reportable issues
	To conduct any reviews or tasks as requested
	Actively participates in the development of Internal Control policies ensuring that they are relevant to the Bank
	Develop and implement appropriate operating procedures to ensure compliance with the Bank&rsquo;s Policies.
	Generate periodic report to the Head Internal control for improve performance
	Monitor and provide advice to minimize risk resulting from poor internal controls.
	Identify areas of financial and administrative strengths and weaknesses and Develop best practices.
	May train other staff on Internal Controls.
	Submit monthly returns to CBN
	Prepare all necessary books for CBN and NDIC audits.


Requirements


	Our client urgently needs the services of a self driven and articulate Internal Control/Compliance Officer with a minimum of 8 yrs experience.
	The ideal candidate must have Bsc/HND in Banking, Finance, Economics or other related fields and must possess MCP. ICAn or ACCA
	Candidates who have worked in similar position in a Microfinance Bank with appreciable knowledge of a MCB Software, CBN regulations and AML laws will have an advantage..


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;bphotjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;jobmasters2020@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-15",

  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

Control / Compliance Officer Job at Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Brilliant Performance Solutions Limited - Our Client a Micro Finance Banking Company is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Control / Compliance Officer

Job Location: Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
Purpose of Position:


	This position plays a key role in the review of policies, implementation of internal controls in the Bank.


Key Functions of the Position:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Daily call over of the bank transactions with system balance
	Carryout Investigation as the Audit checklist and supervisor’s recommendation to achieve optimal result for the bank.
	To plan, organize and carry out the internal controls function including the preparation of an audit manual, audit plan, scheduling and assigning work and estimating resource needs.
	Conduct risk assessment of departments/functional areas in accordance with timelines.
	Conduct audit testing of potential risk areas and identify reportable issues
	To conduct any reviews or tasks as requested
	Actively participates in the development of Internal Control policies ensuring that they are relevant to the Bank
	Develop and implement appropriate operating procedures to ensure compliance with the Bank’s Policies.
	Generate periodic report to the Head Internal control for improve performance
	Monitor and provide advice to minimize risk resulting from poor internal controls.
	Identify areas of financial and administrative strengths and weaknesses and Develop best practices.
	May train other staff on Internal Controls.
	Submit monthly returns to CBN
	Prepare all necessary books for CBN and NDIC audits.


Requirements


	Our client urgently needs the services of a self driven and articulate Internal Control/Compliance Officer with a minimum of 8 yrs experience.
	The ideal candidate must have Bsc/HND in Banking, Finance, Economics or other related fields and must possess MCP. ICAn or ACCA
	Candidates who have worked in similar position in a Microfinance Bank with appreciable knowledge of a MCB Software, CBN regulations and AML laws will have an advantage..


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
